row.label: MEASURED

gate_report.label: MEASURED (same-arch half only; cross-arch half not yet run)
gate_report.interpretation: SAME-ARCH BASELINE ESTABLISHED, CROSS-ARCH PENDING: on one box the same config agrees with itself at worst-tile 1.0000 (same seed) and 1.0000 (different seed = the Monte-Carlo noise floor at this spp). The gated cross-arch number does not exist until the CUDA half renders the shipped manifest; nothing here predicts it.

row.note: CROSS-ARCH GATE stage 1 (self-consistency + canonical export) on 'classroom' frame 1/2 (960x540), THREE real renders on one box, all the EXACT exp_render_stack.py reference recipe (512 spp fixed, adaptive OFF, denoiser OFF, guides OFF, light-tree at the scene default, deterministic camera path): A (seed=0), A2 (seed=0, fresh subprocess — the SAME-SEED determinism pair) and B (seed=12345 — the CROSS-SEED Monte-Carlo noise floor). per-tile SSIM on the 8x8 grading grid (same _tone/_tile_rects as the delivery gate). The canonical EXR is render A; the manifest pins config_hash + EXR sha256 so the CUDA half reproduces the IDENTICAL config or refuses. All values MEASURED on real pixels; modeled=false. Config parity asserted in code before any render.

row.label: MEASURED

gate_report.label: MEASURED (same-arch half only; cross-arch half not yet run)
gate_report.interpretation: SAME-ARCH BASELINE ESTABLISHED (DETERMINISM ONLY), CROSS-ARCH PENDING: on one box the same config+seed reproduces at worst-tile 1.0000. The cross-seed pair ALSO reproduced (worst-tile 1.0000) because cycles.seed is MEASURED-INERT on this Blender build — different seeds do not change the Monte-Carlo realization, so NO same-arch noise floor exists; the determinism ceiling is the only same-arch baseline. The gated cross-arch number does not exist until the CUDA half renders the shipped manifest; nothing here predicts it.

row.note: CROSS-ARCH GATE stage 1 (self-consistency + canonical export) on 'classroom' frame 1/2 (960x540), THREE real renders on one box, all the EXACT exp_render_stack.py reference recipe (512 spp fixed, adaptive OFF, denoiser OFF, guides OFF, light-tree at the scene default, deterministic camera path): A (seed=0), A2 (seed=0, fresh subprocess — the SAME-SEED determinism pair) and B (seed=12345 — the CROSS-SEED Monte-Carlo noise floor). per-tile SSIM on the 8x8 grading grid (same _tone/_tile_rects as the delivery gate). The canonical EXR is render A; the manifest pins config_hash + EXR sha256 so the CUDA half reproduces the IDENTICAL config or refuses. All values MEASURED on real pixels; modeled=false. Config parity asserted in code before any render. seed_effect=inert: raw max|d| same-seed 1.43e-06 vs cross-seed 1.19e-06 — cycles.seed is INERT on this build (different seeds reproduce the same Monte-Carlo realization to float epsilon; independently confirmed at 8 spp where the image is visibly noisy), so the cross-seed baseline is DEGENERATE and flagged; the determinism ceiling is the only same-arch baseline.
